benefits.description: Significant tanning/darkening of skin, enhanced response to sun exposure; had pre-existing tan from outdoor farmers market work

protocol_notes: Total of 5 doses: .25mg day 1, .5mg day 2, .25mg day 3, .25mg day 5, and one more .25mg dose a few days later. Vial was 10mg/2mL (1 unit = .05mg). Was outside regularly (working farmers market) which enhanced tanning effect. Intended to use for appetite suppression and improved metabolism but did not take long enough to notice those effects.
